zh.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'是Llywelyn ab Iorwerth的女兒，於1230年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾坎崔福。她於1266年與Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1295年2月14日在英國蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'是Llywelyn ab Iorwerth的女儿，于1230年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾坎崔福。她于1266年与Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1295年2月14日在英国苏格兰阿爾迪史爾吉爾德盧米享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

nameMeanings.name: Llywelyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Llewellyn
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Llywelyn, derived from British Celtic Lugubelinos, itself from the divine name Lugus + an uncertain second element often used alone as a name. Through association with llew ‘lion’, it was altered to Llewelyn. This was the name of two princes of north Wales who held the Normans at bay for many years in the 13th century. Etymologically speaking, the form with a fourth -l- is an error, not found as an original Welsh name, but this is now much the most common spelling in the US.

nameMeanings.name: 'The
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 鄭, possibly based on its Hokkien or Teochew pronunciation, see   Zheng   1.

variants.name: Zheng
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Jian, Yi, Bin, Hong, Hua, Li, Wei, Yong, Ting, Xin, Yan, Hui, Min, Hao, Shen, Da, Quan, Tian, Chong.

Mandarin form of the surname 鄭: from Zheng (鄭), the name of a state (located in part of present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) granted to You, the younger brother of King Xuan of Zhou (reigned 827–782  BC ). The state of Zheng was annexed by the state of Han (located in present-day Shaanxi and Henan provinces) during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Younger'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Northumberland and eastern Scotland): from Middle English yungre ‘younger’, comparative of Young , used to distinguish a younger man from an older man bearing the same personal name (typically, father and son). In one case, at least, however, the name is known to have been borne by an immigrant Fleming, and was probably an Americanized form of Middle Dutch jongheer ‘young nobleman’ (see Jonker ).
Americanized form of various cognate or like-sounding names in other languages, notably German   Junger   and   Junker  , or Dutch   Jonker  .

variants.name: Young
meanings: English, Scottish, and northern Irish: nickname from Middle English yong ‘young’ (Old English geong), used to distinguish a younger man from an older man bearing the same personal name (typically, father and son). In Middle English this name is often found with the Anglo-Norman French definite article, for example Robert le Yunge. In Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland this was widely used as an English equivalent of the Gaelic nickname Og ‘young’; see Ogg . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘young’ or similar, notably German   Jung  , Dutch   Jong   and   De Jong  , and French   Lejeune   and   Lajeunesse  .
Americanized form of Swedish Ljung: topographic or an ornamental name from ljung ‘(field of) heather’, or a habitational name from a placename containing this word, e.g. Ljungby.

nameMeanings.name: Elen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Helen , now also used outside Wales. It is identical with the Welsh vocabulary word elen ‘nymph’, but this is unlikely to be the origin. It is found in Welsh texts from an early period as an equivalent of Helen, for example as the name of the mother of Constantine, finder of the True Cross.

en.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' was born in 1230, in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales as the daughter of Llywelyn ab Iorwerth. She married Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar in 1266, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 14 February 1295, in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.Cistercian abbey of Aberconwy, Conwy, Ca: Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' est née en 1230, à Cantref, Breconshire, Galles, fille de Llywelyn ab Iorwerth. Elle a épousé Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar en 1266, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 février 1295, à Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' wurde 1230 in Cantref, Breconshire, Wales, als Tochter von Llywelyn ab Iorwerth geboren. Sie hat 1266 in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Februar 1295 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' è nata il nel 1230 nel Cantref, Breconshire, Galles come figlia di Llywelyn ab Iorwerth. Lei sposato Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar nel 1266, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1295, nel Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'は1230年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアカントレフでLlywelyn ab Iorwerthの娘として生まれた。1266年にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーでEarl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Marと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1295年2月14日にイギリススコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアキルドルンミーで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger'(은)는 1230년 웨일스 브레콘실르 캔트레프에서 Llywelyn ab Iorwerth의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1266년 스컷랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1295년 2월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 압르디실르 킬드럼미에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' nasceu em 1230, em Cantref, Breconshire, Gales filha de Llywelyn ab Iorwerth. Ela casou-se com Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar em 1266, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1295, em Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ro.Cistercian abbey of Aberconwy, Conwy, Ca: Conwy, Caernarfonshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' родилась в 1230 г. в местности кантреф, брекуншир, Уэльс. Её отца звали Llywelyn ab Iorwerth. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar в 1266 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 14 февраля 1295 г. в местности каилдрумми, абирдиншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Elen ferch Llywelyn 'The Younger' nació en 1230, en Cantref, Breconshire, Gales como hija de Llywelyn ab Iorwerth. Se casó con Earl Domhnall Mac Uillem 6th Earl of Mar en 1266, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1295, en Kildrummy, Aberdeenshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
